mapper.select:
SELECT ID INVOICE_REQUEST_ID SERIAL_NUMBER NATURE_LINES ITEM SPECIFICATION MEASUREMENT_DIMENSION QUANTITY PRICE AMOUNT TAX_SCHEME TAX_AMOUNT TAX_MARK PRODUCT_CODE SELF_PRODUCT_CODE ZERO_TAX_SCHEME_MARK CREATE_BY CREATE_BY_NAME CREATE_TIME UPDATE_BY UPDATE_BY_NAME UPDATE_TIME FROM T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST_ITEM
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST_ITEM(ID, INVOICE_REQUEST_ID, NATURE_LINES, ITEM, SPECIFICATION, MEASUREMENT_DIMENSION, QUANTITY, PRICE, AMOUNT, TAX_SCHEME, TAX_AMOUNT, TAX_MARK, PRODUCT_CODE, SELF_PRODUCT_CODE, ZERO_TAX_SCHEME_MARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceRequestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{natureLines, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specification, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{measurementDimension, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxScheme, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxMark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selfProductCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zeroTaxSchemeMark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST_ITEM SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_REQUEST_ID = #{invoiceRequestId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERIAL_NUMBER = #{serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NATURE_LINES = #{natureLines,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ITEM = #{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPECIFICATION = #{specification,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEASUREMENT_DIMENSION = #{measurementDimension,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRICE = #{price,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AMOUNT = #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_SCHEME = #{taxScheme,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_AMOUNT = #{taxAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_MARK = #{taxMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRODUCT_CODE = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELF_PRODUCT_CODE = #{selfProductCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ZERO_TAX_SCHEME_MARK = #{zeroTaxSchemeMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
